providers.name: Amazon Bedrock
providers.quota: AWS Free Tier includes access to Bedrock with limits on specific models for 12 months. Requires AWS account with billing info.

providers.name: Baseten
providers.quota: $10 in free GPU credits upon registration for model deployment and cold-start testing.

providers.name: Cerebras
providers.quota: Free tier with 1M tokens/day and ultra-fast inference. 8K context limit on free tier. 30 RPM, 14,400 RPD.

providers.name: Cloudflare
providers.quota: 10,000 free Neurons per day across 50+ models. No credit card required.

providers.name: Fireworks
providers.quota: $1 in free trial credits upon signup. Pay-as-you-go thereafter.

providers.name: Google Vertex
providers.quota: $300 in free trial credits for new Google Cloud accounts. Rate limits subject to GCP tier.

providers.name: MiniMax
providers.quota: Free API usage credits upon signup. Real-name verification may be required for full access.

providers.name: Mistral
providers.quota: Free 'Experiment' plan: ~1B tokens/month, 1 RPS rate limit. Prompts may be used to improve models.

providers.name: Morph
providers.quota: Free credits upon signup for database-aware agent execution and model testing.

providers.name: NovitaAI
providers.quota: $0.50 in free API credits on registration. Invite users via referral to earn $20+ per referral.

providers.name: Parasail
providers.quota: Deploys LLM inference with small free credit allowances upon registration.

providers.name: Perplexity
providers.quota: $5/month API credit included with Perplexity Pro subscriptions. Referral gives $10 off Pro subscriptions.

providers.name: SambaNova
providers.quota: Permanently free tier for Llama 3.1 models. 20 RPM, 200K tokens/day limit.

providers.name: SiliconFlow
providers.quota: Permanently free models (DeepSeek, Qwen). Real-name verification grants additional credits. Referral grants registration bonuses.
